zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Lister於1591年6月22日出生在英國越可爾賓格利時，他的父親Thomas Lister32歲，母親Jennet Potts23歲。他於1614年7月12日與Jane Bywell在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1643年12月15日在英國越可爾易亞斯特 莫頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Lister于1591年6月22日出生在英国越可爾賓格利时，他的父亲Thomas Lister32岁，母亲Jennet Potts23岁。他于1614年7月12日与Jane Bywell在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1643年12月15日在英国越可爾易亞斯特 莫頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国越可爾利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Lister was born on 22 June 1591, in Bingley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Lister, was 32 and his mother, Jennet Potts, was 23. He married Jane Bywell on 12 July 1614, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 15 December 1643, in East Morton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Lister est né le 22 juin 1591, à Bingley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Lister, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jennet Potts, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Jane Bywell le 12 juillet 1614, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1643, à East Morton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Jane Bywell il 12 luglio 1614, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1643, nel East Morton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Listerが1591年6月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアビングリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Listerは32歳，母Jennet Pottsは23歳であった。1614年7月12日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJane Bywellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1643年12月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスト モートンで52歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.Gisburn, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 디인 세인트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Lister(이)가 1591년 6월 22일 영국 요르크실르 빙글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lister(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Jennet Potts(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1614년 7월 12일 영국 요르크실르에서 Jane Bywell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1643년 12월 15일 영국 요르크실르 이스트 모르턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.Gisburn, Lancashire, England: Saint Mary the Virgin, Deane, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Lister nasceu em 22 de junho de 1591, em Bingley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Lister, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jennet Potts, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Bywell em 12 de julho de 1614, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1643, em East Morton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Lister родился 22 июня 1591 г. в местности бингли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Lister было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jennet Potts, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Bywell 12 июля 1614 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 декабря 1643 г. в местности эаст мортон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия.
